clusters.headline: Britain will ban under-16s from social media apps, including TikTok and YouTube
clusters.summary: The ban will apply to platforms including Snapchat, TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook and X. The move makes the U.K. part of a growing global movement to tighten online safety for children.

clusters.headline: Swiss to vote on whether to cap population at 10 million
clusters.summary: On June 14, Swiss voters will be able to decide on a far-right initiative to curb future immigration. What will it mean for the economy — and the country's European neighbors — if they approve the proposal?

clusters.headline: South African TV star arrested after allegedly kidnapping man in girlfriend dispute
clusters.summary: Molemo "Jub Jub" Maarohanye is accused of trapping a taxi driver in a car and firing a gun in the man's direction.

clusters.headline: UK Court of Appeal upholds ban on Palestine Action as ‘terrorist’ group
clusters.summary: Judge says the group's behaviour was not that of a non-violent, direct action organisation.

clusters.headline: World Cup 2026: Spain vs Cape Verde prediction, schedules, latest news
clusters.summary: Spain, Belgium, Uruguay and Iran begin their campaigns as off-field stories also shape the World Cup.

clusters.headline: Nigeria: Abducted Retired Major-General Abubakar Dies in Captivity
clusters.summary: [This Day] Following the death of the former Director of Defence Information, Defence Headquarters (DHQ), Major General Rabe Abubakar (rtd.), in the den of bandits, the DHQ has reaffirmed its resolve to eradicate terrorism.

clusters.headline: Russian strikes kill 11 and set historic cathedral in Kyiv ablaze
clusters.summary: A Ukrainian drone attack in the Russian city of Tula, south of Moscow, killed three people.

clusters.headline: Fifa to pay Somali referee Artan full World Cup fee
clusters.summary: Somali referee Omar Artan, who was denied entry to the United States to officiate at the World Cup, will still receive his tournament fee from Fifa in full.

clusters.headline: New Singapore Cruise Centre terminal at Harbourfront to open in July, ferry operators to move in 2 phases
clusters.summary: Travellers heading to Batam and other Indonesian destinations will need to use the new terminal from July. There will be no changes to ferry routes and schedules.

clusters.headline: Zimbabwe: Zimbabwe Targets to Re-Enrol Out-of-School Learners After 40,000 Dropped Out in 2025 Alone
clusters.summary: [New Zimbabwe] Government has rolled out a programme to locate and return to class thousands of pupils who abandoned school last year, after data showed almost 40,000 learners exited the education system due to various hardships.

clusters.headline: South Africa: 1976 Student Uprising Leader Still Haunted By 'Rows of Bodies in the Mortuary'
clusters.summary: [GroundUp] Seth Mazibuko is part of a team heading the "1976 at 50" campaign to commemorate the day

clusters.headline: World Cup 2026: Saudi football's star-studded revolution has yet to lift the national team
clusters.summary:
World Cup 2026: Saudi football's star-studded revolution has yet to lift the national team
